response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a fan-message compilation for a Hololive concert. 2. Determined the background music from 00:00 to 04:45 is instrumental. 3. Identified the song from 04:46 as 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ Ai Ra Bu Yu' by Hololive 3rd Generation via the Hololive concert promotional material. 4. Searched for the lyrics to 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ Ai Ra Bu Yu' and found the song title and lyrics. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the detected scenes, song metadata, and lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional message and advertisement for the 'hololive 3rd generation' live concert event 'Kimi to Aoi Daisaishin'. It features a series of fan-submitted messages and images, accompanied by instrumental background music, followed by a short clip from the music video for the song 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ Ai Ra Bu Yu' (often referred to as 'Kira!').

scenes.description: A scrolling promotional video featuring fan letters and illustrations on a pink background, with upbeat instrumental pop music playing in the background.
A short clip from the official music video of the song 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ Ai Ra Bu Yu' featuring the four members of hololive 3rd generation.
scenes.song_title: あいあいあいあい♡あいらぶゆー
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive 3rd generation (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: あいあい あいあい ♡ あいらぶゆー\nもう あいあい あいあい ♡ あいにじゅー\nもっと (もっと) もっと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ I love you\nAlready Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ I need you\nMore (more) more
